#### Add bins {bin}

Taxonomic, geographic and temporal bins were added to the data as:

* `r paste0(names(settings$grain), ": ", settings$grain, collapse = "\n* ")`

where: spatial grain is in metres ('res' for resolution); and temporal grain is a period of time described using the [ISO 8601](https://www.iso.org/iso-8601-date-and-time-format.html) standard.
